metadata.description: Generic agent orchestration plugin for Claude Code. 7 specialized agents, 11 skills, config-driven workflows, memory system, and parallel sprint execution.

plugins.name: dev-workflow
plugins.description: Full dev-workflow plugin: 7 agents (builder, tester, reviewer, planner, designer, debugger, migrator), 11 skills (router, init, scan, sprint, plan, design, hotfix, status, doctor, pr, memory), config-driven quality gates, feedback loops, memory system, and run observability.
